action_completed: Added a fail-closed reconciliation gate between handoff promotion records and canonical queue state.
verification: Four deterministic tests passed in an isolated Node runtime using byte-identical committed content.

claim_states.observed: The existing promotion validator did not prove canonical queue correspondence.
claim_states.inferred: Executable continuity work requires exact agreement between promotion authorization and ACTIVE_QUEUE fields.
claim_states.proposed: Wire the gate into queue-changing CI or tooling.
claim_states.superseded: Isolated promotion validation as sufficient queue authorization proof.
claim_states.unresolved: No M-002 record or repository-wide queue gate exists yet.

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and governance logic only; private chat, health material, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads remain excluded.
next_action: Add a repository workflow that loads ACTIVE_QUEUE.json and all promotion records, runs the gate, and blocks mismatched executable successors without modifying completed history.
